description: Block, Inc. is a financial technology company and corporate parent of products including Square, Cash App, Afterpay, TIDAL, Bitkey, and Proto. The block.xyz domain serves as a corporate and open-source information site.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on block.xyz itself; the domain appears to be a corporate site linking out to separate product brands and open-source projects rather than exposing its own API, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface.
